mapper.sql: l.log_id AS logId, l.appointment_id AS appointmentId, l.visitor_id AS visitorId, l.security_id AS securityId, l.access_type AS accessType, l.verify_method AS verifyMethod, l.authorizer_id AS authorizerId, l.access_time AS accessTime, a.visitor_name AS visitorName, u.real_name AS visitorNameAlt, a.visitor_phone AS visitorPhone, u.phone AS visitorPhoneAlt, a.visitor_id_card AS visitorIdCard, a.visit_reason AS visitReason, a.expected_start_time AS expectedStartTime, a.expected_end_time AS expectedEndTime, a.status AS appointmentStatus, su.real_name AS securityName, su.phone AS securityPhone, au.real_name AS authorizerName, au.phone AS authorizerPhone, CASE WHEN l.authorizer_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS emergency

LEFT JOIN appointment a ON l.appointment_id = a.appointment_id LEFT JOIN user u ON l.visitor_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user su ON l.security_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN user au ON l.authorizer_id = au.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_log (appointment_id, visitor_id, security_id, access_type, access_time, verify_method, authorizer_id) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{visitorId}, #{securityId}, #{accessType}, #{accessTime}, #{verifyMethod}, #{authorizerId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND access_type = #{accessType}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND access_type = 2

SELECT
FROM access_log l
AND l.access_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND l.access_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND (a.visitor_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR a.visitor_phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR su.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR au.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND l.access_type = #{accessType} AND l.verify_method = #{verifyMethod} AND l.authorizer_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY l.access_time DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM access_log WHERE log_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= #{start} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY label
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%H:00') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= #{start} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%H:00') ORDER BY label
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%H:00') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= #{start} AND access_time <= #{end} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%H:00') ORDER BY label
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURDATE() AND access_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURDATE() AND access_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND access_type = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURDATE() AND access_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND access_type = 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURDATE() AND access_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND authorizer_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE authorizer_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label, COUNT(1) AS value FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(access_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY label
